title: Totem Bar
description: Displays a totem counter above the hunger bar using small icons. Easily keep track of how many Totems of Undying you have at a glance.
body:
# Totem Bar

> Compact Totem Counter HUD for Minecraft

**Totem Bar** is a simple client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.5+ that adds a compact, icon-based indicator just above the hunger bar to show how many **Totems of Undying** you currently have. It mirrors the look and feel of existing HUD elements like the armor and air bars, using small 9x9 pixel icons

The bar displays up to 10 totems: **full icons for those held in hand**, and **empty icons for those stored in your inventory**. This makes it easy to distinguish between actively equipped and backup totems without opening your inventory


🛠️ [**Mod Menu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is required to configure Totem Bar. Without it, the mod works but cannot be configured


## Supported Mods

Totem Bar detects and adjusts its rendering when the following mods are present:

- [**Better Mount HUD**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud) — Adjusts the vertical position of the totem bar to account for the hunger bar re-added while mounted
- [**Raised**](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised) — Lifts the totem bar by 2 pixels to match Raised’s globally elevated HUD layout
